document_info.prepared_by: Pennsylvania Compensation Rating Bureau (Analyst ID: RA-9405)

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction contractor — operations include carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, painting, project management/superintendence, and clerical office functions

coverages_discussed.notes: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 effective 08/01/2025 through 08/01/2026. Rating Plan: Large Risk. Interstate Rating: No. Risk ID: 609402-1243. Total expected losses: $1,095,520. Total payroll across all classifications: $31,094,800.

positives: Final experience modification factor of 0.86 is below 1.00, indicating better-than-average loss experience relative to expected losses
Actual incurred losses ($548,404) are substantially below expected losses ($1,095,520)
Actual primary losses ($335,671) are well below expected losses, contributing to a favorable mod
Actual excess losses ($212,733) are significantly below expected excess losses ($1,132,496)
Rated under Large Risk plan, reflecting a sizable, established operation
concerns: 20 total claims reported across the three-year experience period (2021-2024)
Policy year 2021-2022 had the highest claim count (10 claims) and highest incurred losses ($240,694)
Masonry classification (5022) carries the highest expected loss rate (4.8000) and largest expected losses ($318,021), indicating elevated risk exposure
Carpentry (5403) and Electrical Wiring (5190) classifications also carry above-average expected loss rates
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year experience period (2021-2024): 20 total claims; total paid $546,031; total incurred $548,404; primary losses $335,671; excess losses $212,733. Year 2023-2024: 7 claims, $191,231 incurred, $120,400 primary, $70,006 excess. Year 2022-2023: 3 claims, $116,409 incurred, $58,000 primary, $58,909 excess. Year 2021-2022: 10 claims, $240,694 incurred, $156,716 primary, $83,978 excess.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc., insured with Hallmark Insurance Group. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86, effective 08/01/2025. Approved by PCRB on 03/15/2026 (Analyst ID: RA-9405). The experience modification factor is subject to state-specific adjustments and rating bureau review. The insured may request a review or appeal of this rating within 90 days of the effective date.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. operates across multiple construction trade classifications in Pennsylvania: Carpentry NOC (5403, $6,910,000 payroll); Electrical Wiring (5190, $4,044,000 payroll); Plumbing NOC (5183, $3,075,000 payroll); Masonry NOC (5022, $6,635,800 payroll); Painting Interior (5474, $1,639,000 payroll); Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (4600, $4,006,000 payroll); Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810, $5,010,000 payroll). Total payroll: $31,094,800.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three policy years of loss data evaluated. 2023-2024: 7 claims, $190,000 total paid, $191,231 total incurred, $120,400 primary, $70,006 excess. 2022-2023: 3 claims, $113,260 total paid, $116,409 total incurred, $58,000 primary, $58,909 excess. 2021-2022: 10 claims, $240,694 total paid, $240,694 total incurred, $156,716 primary, $83,978 excess. Totals: 20 claims, $546,031 paid, $548,404 incurred, $335,671 primary, $212,733 excess.
